input: user-item interaction graph, item-entity knowledge graph, collaborative knowledge structures
backbone: lightweight GCN for interaction signals, GAT for knowledge information, collaborative knowledge propagation module
loss: multi-level contrastive learning loss (implicitly combined with recommendation loss)
key_idea: multi-level contrastive learning across user-item, item-entity, and collaborative knowledge levels to enhance representation and filter noise
datasets: three different datasets (not named in abstract)
